name: day-boundary-cleanup
description: Verify day boundary fires at midnight, cleans up presence, and resets metrics
preconditions: 10 NPCs running, simulate to 2024-01-01 23:59:00 with metrics on day 1
expectedOutcome: day_summary event fires at midnight, daily presence cleared, metrics finalized

steps.comment: Advance to end of day 1 / start of day 2
Day boundary processing fires day_summary event
